content.full_text:
June 1, 2004

Alita Godwin
City of Compton
City Clerk’s Office
205 So. Willowbrook Avenue
Compton, CA 90220

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-04-118

Dear Ms. Godwin:

This letter confirms the receipt of your May 24, 2004 request for advice regarding Hashim Bomani, Candidate for Compton City Mayor. Under the provisions of California Code of Regulations section 18329(b)(8)(B), unless you are an authorized representative of Mr. Bomani, for whom you seek assistance, the Fair Political Practices Commission cannot address your questions or provide analysis. I have enclosed a copy of regulation 18329 for your review. If you believe a violation of the Political Reform Act has occurred, you may file a formal complaint (see enclosed complaint form) with our Enforcement Division.

Should you have any additional questions regarding this matter, please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: [signature]
Galena West
Counsel, Legal Division
